name: New Construction Lead — Auto-Email to Lead

actions.subject: Welcome to Worthey Aquatics — We'll Be in Touch Shortly
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Thank you for reaching out to Worthey Aquatics! We're excited about the possibility of bringing your dream pool to life.

Your dedicated Pool Consultant, {{lead.salesperson_fullName}}, will be giving you a call shortly to introduce themselves and learn more about your project.

Here's what to expect:
1. A quick introductory call to discuss your vision
2. An on-site consultation to review your space and options
3. A detailed proposal tailored to your project

In the meantime, feel free to check out some of our recent work at wortheyaquatics.com.

We look forward to working with you!

Best regards,
{{lead.salesperson_fullName}}
Pool Consultant
Worthey Aquatics
{{lead.salesperson_phone_display}}

name: New Service Lead — Auto-Email to Lead

actions.subject: Worthey Aquatics — We'll Be in Touch About Your Pool Service
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

Thank you for contacting Worthey Aquatics! We appreciate you trusting us with your pool service needs.

Our Service Manager, Richard Castille, will be giving you a call shortly to discuss your specific needs and get you taken care of.

Whether it's weekly maintenance, equipment repair, or a one-time service call, we've got you covered. We service the entire San Antonio area and pride ourselves on reliable, quality work.

If you need to reach us in the meantime, don't hesitate to call or text.

Best regards,
Richard Castille
Service Manager
Worthey Aquatics
(210) 250-1416

name: No Answer Day 7 Drip — Construction Lead (Email)

actions.subject: Still thinking about that pool? Let's talk.
actions.body:
Hi {{lead.name}},

I wanted to follow up one more time regarding your pool project inquiry. I know life gets busy, and I want to make sure you have everything you need to make a decision.

Whether you're still in the early planning stages or ready to move forward, I'm happy to answer any questions, walk through design ideas, or set up a no-pressure consultation at your convenience.

We're heading into the busy season, and availability for spring/summer builds is starting to fill up. If timing is a factor, now is a great time to get on the schedule.

Feel free to reply to this email, call, or text me anytime.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards,
{{lead.salesperson_fullName}}
{{lead.salesperson_title}}
Worthey Aquatics
{{lead.salesperson_phone_display}}
